name: iBio, Inc.
business: iBio, Inc. is a preclinical stage biotechnology company leveraging AI for the development of hard-to-drug precision antibodies targeting cardiometabolic and obesity indications. The company's product candidates are all in preclinical development, with no approved commercial products or clinical trial results to date. Revenue is currently generated from collaborative research services and license fees.
sellsTo: potential out-licensing partners in immunology, inflammation, pain, vaccines

exposures.sentence: iBio, Inc. (also referred to as 'we', 'us', 'our', 'iBio', or the 'Company') is a preclinical stage biotechnology company leveraging the power of Artificial Intelligence ( AI ) for the development of hard-to-drug precision antibodies in the cardiometabolic and obesity space.

catalysts.event: Commencement of first human clinical trials
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate the commencement of our first human clinical trials in late fiscal 2026 or early fiscal 2027.
